sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41426" key="e)pitrihra/rxhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτρῐηράρχ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n41426.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burden of a trierarchy continued beyond the legal term,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0014.tlg050.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
